headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 15, 2026**
article:
The Philadelphia Phillies took a thrilling 11-9 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Kyle Schwarber's 3-hit, 2-home run performance. The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, thanks to Zack Littell's 5.0 innings of scoreless relief. The Detroit Tigers outlasted the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2, with Andrés Giménez recording 1 hit and 2 RBI for the Blue Jays. The Cincinnati Reds secured a hard-fought 7-6 win over the Cleveland Guardians, with Matt McLain leading the Reds' offense.

Several key players have been placed on the injured list, including Clay Holmes of the New York Mets, who suffered a right fibula fracture, and Max Fried of the New York Yankees, who has a left elbow bone bruise. Other players on the injured list include Matt Strahm of the Kansas City Royals, Matt Waldron of the San Diego Padres, Blake Snell of the Los Angeles Dodgers, Chase Dollander of the Colorado Rockies, Cal Raleigh of the Seattle Mariners, and Jimmy Herget of the Colorado Rockies.

The Chicago White Sox made a trade, acquiring center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. The Athletics also traded right-hander Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for second baseman Alika Williams, and right-hander Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded left-hander José Suarez to the Athletics for cash.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Thrilling 11-9 Victory Over Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies outlasted the Pittsburgh Pirates in a high-scoring matchup, securing an 11-9 win. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, driving in 5 runs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, securing a crucial win. Zack Littell led the Nationals to victory, pitching 5.0 innings with 3 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2 in a closely contested game. Andrés Giménez led the Blue Jays' offense with 1 hit and 2 RBI, while Trey Yesavage pitched 6 strong innings for the Blue Jays, striking out 6 and allowing 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Guardians in Thrilling 7-6 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a hard-fought win over the Cleveland Guardians, coming out on top 7-6. Matt McLain led the Reds' offense with a strong performance, recording 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Mets RHP Clay Holmes Sidelined with Fracture**
top_news.summary: New York Mets right-hander Clay Holmes has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right fibula fracture.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire Junior Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove.
